series_metadata.series_title: Labor Market Information Multiple Worksite Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Quarterly statistical reports detailing employment and wage information from employers with multiple worksite locations. File includes, but not limited to, a detailed report for each worksite location on the number of employees and quarterly wages paid.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 2 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 2 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
